message: agent1: implementing fallback_searchpath param for FileSystemLoader in src/jinja2/loaders.py (get_source, list_templates, __init__). Will touch that file.

For FileSystemLoader I'll add path_transform after followlinks, transform template at the top of get_source before split_template_path, but keep TemplateNotFound raised with the ORIGINAL template name. I'll use targeted Edit calls (not full-file rewrites) so your fallback_searchpath changes to __init__/get_source/list_templates should merge fine as long as you also use targeted edits.
